creator: peter.blok@bsd4all.org
text:
I have created /usr/local/etc/libmap.d/mysql.conf with the following content
[/usr/local/libexec/mysqld]          
        libprotobuf-lite.so.24.4.0      /usr/local/libexec/../lib/mysql/private/libprotobuf-lite.so.24.4.0


This allows mysql to run with bind-tools and protobuf installed
